summary: Completed frontend testing of SAMIDEL custom listings features. Successfully verified compact table mode, toggle functionality, PDF export, Vista Completa with 10 columns, and dark header implementation.

design_issues.issue: Boolean badges with ✓/✗ symbols not visible in current data set
design_issues.note: Implementation exists in code but no boolean data available to display

passed_tests: Custom listings page loads at /listings route
Vista Completa - 10 Colunas view exists and displays 10 columns
Compact mode is active by default (text-xs class applied)
Toggle button between compact/normal mode works (Minimize2/Maximize2 icons)
PDF export button exists and is clickable (Download icon)
All 7 custom views are visible and accessible
View cards display correct information (name, description, column count)
